mapper.sql: id , live_id, month, bed_cost, care_cost, food_cost, total_cost, remark, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_bill (id, live_id, month, bed_cost, care_cost, food_cost, total_cost, remark, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{liveId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bedCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{careCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{foodCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{totalCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_bill
id,
live_id,
month,
bed_cost,
care_cost,
food_cost,
total_cost,
remark,
status,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{liveId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bedCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{careCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{foodCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{totalCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_bill
live_id = #{liveId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
month = #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bed_cost = #{bedCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
care_cost = #{careCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
food_cost = #{foodCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
total_cost = #{totalCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_bill set live_id = #{liveId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, month = #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bed_cost = #{bedCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, care_cost = #{careCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, food_cost = #{foodCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, total_cost = #{totalCost,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select * from t_bill where live_id = #{liveId} and month = #{month}
